channel.title: Cayden Lunt Blog
channel.description: Software engineering notes, technical milestones, and lessons learned from Cayden Lunt.

item.title: From Commit to Package: Building and Shipping a QR Code Generator with CI/CD
item.description: How QRGenerator and QuickQRForge demonstrate the difference between working code and software that is packaged, automated, and shipped with CI/CD.

item.title: Why Learning Assembly Still Matters (A Developer's Perspective)
item.description: Why even a small assembly project can change how you think about memory, operating systems, debugging, and performance.

item.title: How I Earned My Web & Computer Programming Certificate from BYU Idaho
item.description: How I earned my Web & Computer Programming certificate from BYU Idaho, what I learned, and how it strengthened my software engineering foundation.
